creator: dfrg@xsmail.com
text:
Created attachment 195524
Dont claim DBus support in wpa_supplicant manual page

The manual page for wpa_supplicant in base (not ports) claims support for DBus via the -u CLI option but the option is rejected as base does not include DBus.

Attached patch removes mention of DBus from manual page. It's one of my first contributions so if patch format is inappropriate further guidance welcomed.
